title: Misty Falls Clan

{{Quote|Sisters and brothers of the Great Canyon Clan, we have heard your message as far away as the Misty Falls Clan and have traveled here to join you. We are not without skill in the Force, and we wish to learn your ways, to use all of the Force and to become strong.|Tenel Ka|<ref name="Shadow Academy" />}}
The '''Misty Falls Clan''' was a [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomiri Witch]] clan village located near the [[Misty Falls/Legends|Misty Falls]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].

{{Stub}}
